original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a physical artifact. The object is a lenticular, disc-shaped model or craft, approximately 12-18 inches in diameter, viewed from a side profile. It features a large, dark, triangular vertical fin or stabilizer attached to the dorsal (top) surface, which shows significant paint wear or chipping near its base. The main disc body is lighter in color with a central raised dome or cockpit-like feature. A thin, horizontal strut or boom extends forward from the disc's leading edge. The underside of the disc has visible rectangular notches or vents spaced around its perimeter. The object rests on a flat surface against a plain, light-colored backdrop, casting a soft shadow to the left and rear. The photograph itself has a white border and shows minor creasing and wear at the corners.

elements.description: One black-and-white photograph showing a disc-shaped object with a tall, dark, triangular fin on top. The object is resting on a flat surface against a plain backdrop. The disc has a series of small, dark rectangular notches along its lower edge. A small protrusion extends from the right side of the disc. No text is visible within the image.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: a black-and-white photograph of a disc-shaped object with a tall dark triangular fin on top, resting on a flat surface against a plain backdrop, with rectangular notches along its lower edge, and no visible text.
